deploy.startCommand: python manage.py migrate --no-input && (python manage.py createcachetable || true) && (python manage.py load_initial_data || true) && (python manage.py setup_plans || true) && (python manage.py shell -c "from django.contrib.auth import get_user_model; U=get_user_model(); U.objects.filter(username='superadmin').exists() or U.objects.create_superuser(username='superadmin', email='admin@stadispace.co.ke', password='Admin@StadiSpace2026!')" || true) && gunicorn backend.wsgi:application --bind 0.0.0.0:$PORT --timeout 120 -w 4 --worker-class sync
